Open an online bank account in the UK before you relocate abroad, trust me, it’ll be one of the smartest moves you make. It helps you manage direct debits, subscriptions (Netflix), and keep proof of UK residency if needed later. Even if it means paying a small utility bill just to keep things active, do it. You’ll thank yourself later! #teachingabroad #ukteachersabroad #expats #relocatingteacher #onlinebanking #moveabroadsmart #financetip #globalteachers #lifeabroad #middleeast #utilitybill #ukresidency
